pier.git.merge.description: Select a branch and merge it into the current branch.
pier.git.merge.title: Git: Merge Branch...

pier.git.switchBranch.description: Switch to a local branch or create a new branch from the current HEAD.
pier.git.switchBranch.title: Git: Switch Branch...

pier.git.stashApply.description: Select a stash and apply it while keeping it in the stash list.
pier.git.stashApply.title: Git: Apply Stash...

pier.git.stashDrop.description: Select a stash and delete it from the stash list.
pier.git.stashDrop.title: Git: Drop Stash...

pier.git.stashIncludeUntracked.description: Stash local changes, including untracked files.
pier.git.stashIncludeUntracked.title: Git: Stash (Include Untracked)

pier.git.stashPop.description: Select a stash, apply it, and remove it from the stash list.
pier.git.stashPop.title: Git: Pop Stash...

pier.git.rebase.description: Select a branch and rebase the current branch onto it.
pier.git.rebase.title: Git: Rebase Branch...

pier.git.cherryPick.description: Select a commit and apply it onto the current branch.
pier.git.cherryPick.title: Git: Cherry-pick Commit...

pier.git.revert.description: Select a commit and create a new commit that reverts it.
pier.git.revert.title: Git: Revert Commit...

pier.git.undoLastCommit.description: Undo the last commit while preserving its changes as staged.
pier.git.undoLastCommit.title: Git: Undo Last Commit

pier.git.review.openFile.description: Open the selected changed file in the files panel.
pier.git.review.openFile.title: Git: Open File

pier.git.review.unstageFile.description: Unstage the selected file's staged changes.
pier.git.review.unstageFile.title: Git: Unstage

pier.git.review.discardFile.description: Restore the selected file's working tree changes.
pier.git.review.discardFile.title: Git: Restore

pier.git.review.stageAll.description: Stage all unstaged and untracked changes, skipping conflicts.
pier.git.review.stageAll.title: Git: Stage All Changes

pier.worktree.create.description: Creates a Git worktree under the repository-managed worktrees directory.
pier.worktree.create.title: Create Worktree

pier.worktree.delete.description: Selects and removes a Git worktree.
pier.worktree.delete.title: Delete Worktrees...

pier.worktree.list.description: Lists Git worktrees for the current repository and opens the selected worktree.
pier.worktree.list.title: List Worktrees

description: Built-in git command palette and terminal status support.

messages.ui.createUnavailable: Worktree creation is not available yet
messages.ui.deleteUnavailable: Worktree deletion is not available yet
messages.ui.reviewTargetGroupMissing: The current panel group is no longer available.
messages.ui.reviewRefreshStale: Some files changed again while refreshing. Their previous diff remains visible until the next Git update.
messages.ui.reviewFailureBusy: Git review is busy. Try again.
messages.ui.reviewFailureCommandFailed: Git could not read this change.
messages.ui.reviewFailureDuplicateOperation: This review request is already running.
messages.ui.reviewFailureInternal: An internal error occurred while reading the change.
messages.ui.reviewFailureInvalidSource: The Git review source is no longer valid.
messages.ui.reviewFailureNotRepository: This directory is no longer a Git repository.
messages.ui.reviewFailureOutputLimit: The change exceeds the review size limit.
messages.ui.reviewFailureStaleRevision: The change kept updating. Try again.
messages.ui.reviewEmptyDescription: The working tree has no staged or unstaged changes.
messages.ui.reviewEmptyDescriptionCommit: The selected commit has no file changes.
messages.ui.reviewEmptyDescriptionBranch: The current branch has no changes relative to {{branch}}.
messages.ui.reviewScopeNoCommitsToReview: This repository has no commits to review.
messages.ui.reviewScopeNoOtherBranches: No other branches to compare against.
messages.ui.reviewAdditionalIssues: Additional changes could not be displayed.
messages.ui.reviewWarningPathDepthExceeded: {{skipped}} paths exceeded the supported directory depth and were skipped.
messages.ui.reviewWarningInvalidPathEncoding: {{skipped}} paths could not be decoded and were skipped.
messages.ui.reviewTreeNoSearchResultsDescription: Try another file name or path.
messages.ui.reviewTreeDiscardConfirm:
Restore changes in {{name}}?
This cannot be undone.
messages.ui.branchGraphCaveatTitle: Counts commit divergence only. Squash or rebase merges may show already-applied commits as branch-only.
messages.ui.deleteBranchSafeDetail: Runs git branch -d; fails if the branch is not merged.
messages.ui.worktreeDeleteBranchFailed: Worktree deleted, but branch {{branch}} could not be removed
messages.ui.gitSwitchSelectBranch: Enter a branch name to switch or create
messages.ui.gitMergeSelectBranch: Select a branch to merge into the current branch
messages.ui.gitRebaseSelectBranch: Select a branch to rebase onto
messages.ui.gitMergeConflictBody: Merge resulted in {{count}} conflict(s) that need to be resolved.
messages.ui.gitStashConflictBody: Stash was applied but resulted in conflicts that need to be resolved.
messages.ui.gitRebaseConflict: Rebase paused due to conflicts. Resolve them, then continue.
messages.ui.gitRebaseContinueConflict: Rebase still has conflicts. Resolve them, then continue.
messages.ui.gitCherryPickConflict: Cherry-pick paused due to conflicts. Resolve them, then continue.
messages.ui.gitCherryPickContinueConflict: Cherry-pick still has conflicts. Resolve them, then continue.
messages.ui.gitRevertConflict: Revert paused due to conflicts. Resolve them, then continue.
messages.ui.gitRevertContinueConflict: Revert still has conflicts. Resolve them, then continue.

messages.ui.title: Worktrees
messages.ui.unsupported: Current directory does not support Git worktrees
messages.ui.worktreeUnavailable.notGitRepository: The current directory is not a Git repository
messages.ui.worktreeCreate.description: Create an isolated worktree for this task
messages.ui.worktreeCreate.errorAgentRequired: Choose an agent to start the task
messages.ui.worktreeCreate.errorBranchInvalid: Enter a valid Git branch name using letters, digits and . _ / -
messages.ui.worktreeCreate.generateFailed.invalid: AI could not generate a valid branch name, try again
messages.ui.worktreeCreate.generateFailed.timeout: Agent timed out, try again or switch to manual naming
messages.ui.worktreeCreate.hookSignalKilledBody: macOS is slow to scan git hooks on first use (common on system 26+). Pier interrupted the operation to avoid hanging. Retrying usually works — this is not a Pier or repo issue.
messages.ui.worktreeCreate.hookSignalKilledTitle: System is scanning git hooks, operation interrupted
messages.ui.worktreeCreate.initializationFailed: Worktree created, but environment initialization failed
messages.ui.worktreeCreate.taskHint: Smart generation uses the task description and current project info to generate a branch name and create an isolated worktree under {{root}}.
messages.ui.worktreeCreate.taskPlaceholder: Example: fix the settings divider alignment
messages.ui.worktreeCreate.startTaskHint: Open a new agent conversation in the created worktree.
messages.ui.worktreeCreate.title: New Worktree
messages.ui.reviewStateTooLargeDetail: File is too large to display a text diff
messages.ui.reviewStateInvalidEncodingDetail: Unsupported text encoding — open the file to inspect
messages.ui.reviewStateConflictDetail: Merge conflict — resolve in the editor

pier.git.statusItem.showDirtyIndicator.label: Show dirty indicator
pier.git.statusItem.showDirtyIndicator.description: Show working tree change counts and line delta in the worktree status item.

pier.git.worktree.branchNamePrompt.label: Worktree branch prompt
pier.git.worktree.branchNamePrompt.description: Optional. Leave blank for the default template. {{task}} becomes the task description; {{projectRootPath}} becomes the project root path.
pier.git.worktree.branchNamePrompt.placeholder: Generate a short branch name for {{task}}. Follow rules in {{projectRootPath}}. Output only the branch name.

pier.worktree.status.description: Shows the current Git worktree in terminal panels.
pier.worktree.status.title: Worktree Status

name: Git
